# Organic AI Solutions

> Organic AI Solutions is a Dallas-based AI consulting firm that deploys production AI agents and AI-native websites for small and mid-sized businesses.

## What we do

- Production AI agent deployments built on enterprise-grade infrastructure
- AI-native websites (Next.js + Claude API + lead capture + conversion tracking)
- Custom AI builds scoped from single-deliverable fixes to multi-agent operational systems

## Founders

- Terrence "TC" Crawford — CEO and co-founder. Handles client relationships, sales, and strategy.
- Diego Kennedy Templeton — CTO and co-founder. Handles agent architecture and infrastructure. Brings production agent-deployment experience from Kyndryl.

## Headquarters

Dallas, TX (remote-first operations)

## Site

- [Home](https://organicaisolutions.ai)
- [Free AI Operations Assessment](https://organicaisolutions.ai/assessment)
